bootstrap.title: Loading Telegram...
bootstrap.body: Preparing startup routing and shared design assets before the first-launch handoff.
bootstrap.failureNotice: Shared design assets failed to load. The app is using embedded fallback content.

login.keepSignedInLabel: Keep me signed in on this device
login.verificationHint: Demo verification stays local and keeps the login shell intact.
login.verificationCodeHint: Enter any 5-digit demo code to continue.
login.invalidInputNotice: Enter a valid demo phone number to continue.
login.invalidCodeNotice: Enter a 5-digit demo code to continue.
login.restoreInvalidNotice: Saved demo session was invalid. Continue with phone login.

subtitles.chats: Shared seed conversations with pinned, muted, and unread cues.

homeShell.actionNoticeTemplate: {actionLabel} is not wired yet in this demo.
homeShell.actionNoticeSuffix: is not wired yet in this demo.
homeShell.placeholderNotice: This destination is intentionally scoped as a placeholder in the current MVP slice.
homeShell.contactsCardBody: Search, quick actions, and an alphabetical contact list keep the tab close to Telegram without adding full contact management yet.
homeShell.settingsCardBody: A compact settings home keeps the demo believable while deeper detail pages stay out of scope.
homeShell.settingsEmptyHeadline: No local demo session is active.
homeShell.settingsEmptyBody: Return to login to seed a local demo session for later slices.

contacts.searchEmptyBody: Try searching by name or status.

sessionPresentation.persistedDetail: This session is saved on this device until you clear it.
sessionPresentation.ephemeralDetail: This session is active for this run only and will not restore on relaunch.

chatList.emptyBody: Shared seed conversations have not been loaded.
chatList.errorBody: Check shared mock data and retry.

chatDetail.sendFailureNotice: The local demo message could not be sent. Try again.
